THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILE. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-23-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
